summary: Iteration 69 - Testing Feature Announcements, Analytics Cleanup, and Spotify Error Handling. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All 6 frontend tests passed (100%). Verified: (1) Analytics endpoints return real data only (zeros when no stream data), (2) CSV import is admin-only (403 for non-admin), (3) Admin Feature Announcements CRUD works correctly, (4) Frontend Import CSV button visibility based on user role, (5) Spotify page shows error state instead of redirecting to login on non-401 errors.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/analytics/overview returns total_streams=0, total_earnings=0, empty breakdowns for new user
Backend: GET /api/analytics/trending returns empty or zero-stream trending items for new user
Backend: GET /api/analytics/leaderboard returns active_releases=0 for new user
Backend: GET /api/analytics/revenue returns combined.total_streams=0, combined.total_gross=0 for new user
Backend: POST /api/analytics/import returns 403 for non-admin user
Backend: POST /api/analytics/import succeeds for admin user
Backend: GET /api/admin/feature-announcements returns list of announcements (admin only)
Backend: POST /api/admin/feature-announcements creates new announcement and notifies users
Backend: POST /api/admin/feature-announcements works with different min_plan values (free, rise, pro)
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/feature-announcements/{id} deletes announcement
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/feature-announcements/{id} returns 404 for nonexistent ID
Backend: Non-admin cannot list feature announcements (403)
Backend: Non-admin cannot create feature announcement (403)
Backend: Admin login works for admin@kalmori.com
Backend: Admin login works for submitkalmori@gmail.com
Frontend: Admin Feature Announcements page loads at /admin/feature-announcements
Frontend: 'New Announcement' button opens form with title, description, category, plan, icon, color fields
Frontend: Creating an announcement from the form works end-to-end
Frontend: Import CSV button IS visible for admin user on Analytics page
Frontend: Import CSV button NOT visible for non-admin user on Analytics page
Frontend: Spotify page shows 'Connect Spotify' state instead of redirecting to login on non-401 errors
critical_code_review_comments: Analytics endpoints correctly return real data only - no simulated/fake data
CSV import endpoint properly checks user.role === 'admin' and returns 403 for non-admin
Feature Announcements CRUD endpoints work correctly with proper admin authentication
Frontend AdminFeatureAnnouncementsPage.jsx has all required data-testid attributes
Frontend AnalyticsPage.jsx correctly wraps Import CSV button in {user?.role === 'admin' && ...}
SpotifyAnalyticsPage.jsx correctly handles errors - only redirects to login on 401, shows error state for other errors
Global axios interceptor in App.js handles auto token refresh on 401 responses
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin accounts and created test users via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 69 verified: (1) Analytics endpoints return real data only - zeros when no stream data exists. (2) CSV import is admin-only - returns 403 for non-admin users. (3) Admin Feature Announcements page at /admin/feature-announcements - supports CRUD operations, notifies all users on creation, shows plan badges (FREE, RISE, PRO). (4) Frontend Import CSV button only visible for admin users. (5) Spotify page shows error state instead of redirecting to login on non-401 errors. (6) Global axios interceptor handles auto token refresh on 401.

endpoints_tested: GET /api/analytics/overview - returns zeros when no data
GET /api/analytics/trending - returns empty/zero-stream items when no data
GET /api/analytics/leaderboard - returns active_releases=0 when no data
GET /api/analytics/revenue - returns combined.total_streams=0 when no data

csv_import_admin_only.non_admin_response: 403 - Only admins can import streaming data

endpoints: POST /api/admin/feature-announcements - creates announcement and notifies users

spotify_error_handling.behavior: Shows error state instead of redirecting to login on non-401 errors
spotify_error_handling.other_errors: Sets error state and displays message

axios_interceptor.behavior: Auto-refreshes token on 401 responses, queues failed requests during refresh
